response.justification: Over a decade of full-stack experience with a strong match on the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and current hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure including MCP code generators, directly aligning with the role's AI-agent development requirement. Demonstrates breadth across backend, frontend, DevOps, and architecture with a clear craftsmanship focus (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development).
strengths: Direct match on primary stack plus current AI-agent/MCP work
Significant senior-level breadth across full stack, DevOps, and databases
Strong engineering craftsmanship culture (TDD, pairing, CI/CD)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
Limited evidence of Kotlin for backend services
Some recent work emphasis on niche languages (DLang) over JVM stack
